steps.title: Use foundational as the clue
steps.content: The passage says the mihrab is foundational to traditional mosque architecture and that even mosques with mixed styles include standard features like it. The blank needs a word for something essential and characteristic.

steps.title: Reject mismatched meanings
steps.content: Choice A means never seen before, which contradicts a standard feature. Choice B means decorated, and Choice C means visually impressive; neither captures essential importance.

steps.title: Choose essential and typical
steps.content: Quintessential means representing the most typical or essential example, which fits a foundational aspect of mosque design. The answer is D.
